name: Request Lifecycle Transition
summary: Request a lifecycle state change for an artifact
description:
Request a lifecycle state transition for an artifact. Transitions follow the path: draft → review → approved → cold.

Not all agents can request all transitions - the runtime validates permissions and artifact state. Transitions to 'cold' (canon commitment) require Gatekeeper approval.

Returns success or actionable error messages explaining what's required.

reasoning.description: Explain why you are calling this tool and what you expect to achieve. This helps ensure thoughtful tool usage.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact to transition

target_state.description: Requested lifecycle state (e.g. 'review', 'approved', 'cold'). Use get_lifecycle_state to see allowed target_state values.

force.description: If true, bypasses requires_validation checks when the lifecycle permits it. Use with care.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact that was targeted

previous_state.description: Lifecycle state before the transition (only for committed transitions)

new_state.description: Lifecycle state after the transition (only for committed transitions)

validation_results.description: Results from any required validations (quality bars)

rejection_reason.description: If result='rejected', explains why the transition was not applied.

guidance.description: Actionable next steps to correct the request (validate-with-feedback).

examples.description: Promote a passage from draft to review after self-validation
Promote an approved passage to cold (Gatekeeper only)
